scripts.bootstrap: pnpm install && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d && node packages/db/scripts/migrate.mjs
scripts.lint: eslint packages apps scripts vitest.config.ts eslint.config.js && prettier --check "packages/**/*.{ts,json}" "apps/**/*.{ts,json}" "*.{json,yaml,yml,js,ts}" "tsconfig.build.json" "docker/docker-compose.yml" "scripts/**/*.mjs" ".github/**/*.yml"
scripts.lint:fix: eslint packages apps scripts vitest.config.ts eslint.config.js --fix && prettier --write "packages/**/*.{ts,json}" "apps/**/*.{ts,json}" "*.{json,yaml,yml,js,ts}" "tsconfig.build.json" "docker/docker-compose.yml" "scripts/**/*.mjs" ".github/**/*.yml"
